ideation: This sequence simulates aiming with a bow and arrow, using the right arm to draw the bow and the left arm to steady it. The sequence will highlight the precision and focus required for archery. Frame 1 starts with the robot in a relaxed stance, arms at the sides. Frame 2 shows the right arm drawing the bowstring back; joint1 rotates outward, joint2 pitches upward, and the wrist is angled to grip the bowstring. Frame 3 shows the robot aiming; the right arm is fully extended, and the left arm is used for stability. Frame 4 shows the release; the right arm relaxes, and the bow is lowered. Frame 5 shows the robot returning to a neutral stance.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready stance
right arm draws the bowstring back with focus
holding steady, aiming carefully at the target
releasing the arrow with a smooth follow-through
arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
